\tzpentry{ID3460}{Text Curvature Kr Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3460 introduces Text Curvature Kr Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n\\nabla^2 \\Psi + f(\\text{curvature}) J_6(kr) = 0.\n\\]
